category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dasm as a macro assembler with support for several 8-bit microprocessors.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dasm; official homepage and repository use the DASM assembler project identity.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official DASM documentation site; source_facts.repo provides the official README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says macro assembler for several 8-bit microprocessors; source_facts.executables lists dasm and ftohex.
